Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 189 upvotes, 18 comments
  2. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 109 upvotes, 13 comments
  3. Agents of Chaos 109 upvotes, 13 comments
  4. Oscar Reutersvärd (2021) 33 upvotes, 2 comments
  5. Unit: A self-replicating Forth mesh agent running in a browser tab 36 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct 307 upvotes, 60 comments
  7. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 562 upvotes, 185 comments
  8. How to turn anything into a router 678 upvotes, 230 comments
  9. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 750 upvotes, 261 comments
  10. Do your own writing 538 upvotes, 193 comments
  11. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 300 upvotes, 119 comments
  12. We're Pausing Asimov Press 24 upvotes, 5 comments
  13. What fork() Actually Copies 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  14. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 318 upvotes, 149 comments
  15. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 240 upvotes, 109 comments
  16. Sony halts memory card shipments due to NAND shortage 51 upvotes, 17 comments
  17. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 414 upvotes, 208 comments
  18. Incident March 30th, 2026 – Accidental CDN Caching 56 upvotes, 21 comments
  19. Good CTE, Bad CTE 32 upvotes, 10 comments
  20. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 110 upvotes, 52 comments
  21. Closed Source AI = Neofeudalism 14 upvotes, 3 comments
  22. GitHub backs down, kills Copilot pull-request ads after backlash 207 upvotes, 120 comments
  23. Artemis II is not safe to fly 316 upvotes, 196 comments
  24. Bird brains (2023) 318 upvotes, 200 comments
  25. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 33 upvotes, 14 comments
  26. Vulnerability research is cooked 181 upvotes, 124 comments
  27. Mr. Chatterbox is a Victorian-era ethically trained model 46 upvotes, 25 comments
  28. Android Developer Verification 251 upvotes, 254 comments
  29. One of the largest salt mines in the world exists under Lake Erie 22 upvotes, 14 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 5:30pm, 31 March 2026. Source here.
